summary: Despite announcing a phase-out, the US used Anthropic's AI during an airstrike on Iran. The technology supported intelligence and target identification, underscoring its significance in military operations, including previous use in capturing Nicolás Maduro.

summary: Flightradar24 reported unprecedented traffic on its platform following US strikes on Iran. The company acknowledged site availability issues and stated that engineers are actively working to resolve them, thanking users for their patience.

summary: Xiaomi is launching its flagship Xiaomi 17 series and Pad 8 tablet today. The live-stream starts at 2PM Barcelona time. The Xiaomi 17 features a 6.3-inch OLED display, Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 processor, Leica triple camera, and a 7,000mAh battery with fast charging.
